rows.label: qev050203_MSG0002
rows.name:
You...! Just who are you?
You are on par with my brothers... no, you're even stronger...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_SEL0011
rows.name:
Bluntly state that with her level of skill,
she would only die a meaningless death.

rows.label: qev050203_SEL0021
rows.name:
Gently explain that her brothers
do not wish for her death.

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Damn it!
Are you saying you proved that with our battle just now?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0004
rows.name:
I... would die...?
That can't be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0005
rows.name:
...No, but...
With my current strength, I could absolutely never win
against the one who cut down my brothers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0006
rows.name: Guh... Damn it! Is that the reality of it?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0007
rows.name:
But, but!
I... I will never give up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0008
rows.name:
I will train more and more, and I will absolutely
defeat both them and you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0009
rows.name:
So, I will return for now...
But someday, I will accomplish my vengeance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050203_MSG0010
rows.name:
And not just that assassin, but every last one of the Growth
will be cut down by my blade![ST:wait ]
